overall settings.title: Tethered
overall settings.description:
How did a pure spirit come to be bound to the earthly plane?

Quest-driven story set in {#b3a25d|d}{#af9d6e|e}{#aa997f|e}{#a69491|p} {#a28fa2|m}{#9d8ab3|y}{#9985c4|t}{#9581d5|h}{#907ce7|o}{#8c77f8|l}{#a38cfb|o}{#ba9fff|g}{#d1b3ff|y}, with extensive dialog.

attribs.name: Bound
attribs.description: For example, hands tied. Limits movement or other actions.

attribs.name: Cha
attribs.description: Charisma helps in persuasion or negotiating prices.

attribs.name: Wil
attribs.description: Emotional and mental fortitude, comparable to Con or Str.

items.name: Animated Tree Bark
items.description: Can only be harvested after the tree is destroyed.

items.name: Beast Melee
items.description: Teeth or claws are the preferred weapons for beasts.

items.name: Blast Point
items.description: Partially submerged weak point in the rocky floor.

items.name: Broken Wagon
items.description: The remains of a smashed wagon and the deceased horses that must have pulled it are here.

items.name: Chain Mail
items.description: Requires high strength to wear and still be able to move freely. Increase HP of wearer by 10.

items.name: Chains
items.description: Used to bind.

items.name: Charcoal
items.description: Made from wood, needed to fuel forges.

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1a
items.description:
Lyria swims down to the library floor, fin flaps raised on her arms and legs. Amidst the bookshelves, there sits an ancient watery figure. She approaches nervously. With gods you might not trust, it's best to be respectfully casual.

She does not greet Atlanth directly, but goes to a nearby shelf and starts looking at the titles. *"Let's see, there must be something on Nalaran history somewhere,"* she says aloud.

This gains Atlanth's interest. *"Would you like to hear where your people came from?"* Sharing lore is one of his favorite things to do, especially with those who live in the waves.

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1b
items.description:
*"Well, we've always been seahorse riders."* Lyria speaks nonchalantly, but keeping her face towards the god, she steps backward, to the end of the first shelf.

*"Seahorses, indeed. But they were not tame at the beginning. There was a year when the seahorses found the settlement and attacked in large numbers with their sharp fins. Your people were forced to hide in trenches."*

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1c
items.description:
*"Sounds awful. How did they survive?"* Rounding the first shelf, Lyria thumbs through the books on the second shelf. *It has to be here somewhere.*

Atlanth is engrossed in storytelling now and does not notice the books Lyria is looking at. *"A mute fisher's daughter named Selthari noticed what others missed. She felt the vibration of their mating calls and sang their own longing back to them, until they became enchanted with desire."*

*"Are you saying the seahorses started going after each other in heat?"* She feigns shock.

He chuckles. *"Each other, no... There's a reason the riders traditionally wore spiked belts."*

items.name: Convo Atlanth 1d
items.description:
Lyria doesn't believe the god's words, although they are amusing. Then, she finds it, a book containing the word "Tethered." She quickly grabs it.

Lyria speaks up, suddenly firm. *"That's quite a tale. But didn't you know, what I really came for was to hear about the {rebeccapurple|Tethered One}. Won't you tell me about him?"* With that, she leaps up and swims for the exit as fast as she can.

He roars. *"What? NOOOO, that's forbidden, you minnow-bitch!"* But she reaches the door and kicks hard. The entire section cracks and crashes down, preventing him from pursuit.

items.name: Convo Crush 1a
items.description:
Lyria finds Crush taking a break from woodcutting in a quiet spot at the base of a cliff. She often meets him here after coming up the road from the eastern shore. He is a reliable listening ear that she has always found reassuring.

*"So then he was going on about these seahorses and I barely had a chance to grab this book and escape."* Lyria's recap had been rushing out for the past 10 minutes before finally she paused.

Crush waits to make sure she's finished before making his own remarks. *"Wow, I think that might be the craziest story I've ever heard from you, and that's saying a lot. But hold on, I know plenty about this guy they call the Tethered One. And it's not good news."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1b
items.description:
Lyria looks at him in surprise. *"You know about him?"*

*"Yeah, the Stonereach play a major role in running Blackvein Hold, what with it being underground and all. I've visited a few times myself. Not through the subterranean water, though,"* he laughs. *"Just the front gate.*"

*"Anyway, the guards say they hate being near his cell. He can slip through almost any crack, and for more than a century now, he's been learning {darkgray|Ithilborn} tricks. Guess he has a natural affinity with their ways. If it weren't for the fact that that prison was made by **Vull** himself, doubtless the Tethered One would be out causing gods know what terror."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1c
items.description:
Lyria ponders this. *"I mean, I'm not saying he comes across as safe, and certainly not warm and friendly like **Dulcie,**"* (this gets a laugh out of Crush), *"but he was convincing enough that I wanted to know what secrets the gods have covered up."*

*"I think you're underestimating him,"* came back Crush. *"Met an unimaginative farmer once who said the Tethered One could pull the spirit right out of a man and stitch it into ships, buildings, even weapons."* His calloused fingers absently traced the woodaxe's edge, as if reassuring himself it bore no enchantments. *"Dunno if it's true, but that farmer? His eyes never blinked right after."*

*"Not to mention what we learned in school history about him allowing the Drowned Court's army to march right up to the celestial realm. They had no choice but to break the Worldbridge or countless lives would have been lost."*

*"That explains how he got tethered to the earthly plane—he was holding open the terrestrial side of the bridge when it was burst. Foolish vanity to go against the gods, and dangerous to boot."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1d
items.description:
*"Well, here is the book."* Lyria takes it out of her pack. *"It has a lot of strange characters, but some are in the common language.*"

*"Now, I found a reference to the Drowned Court King, when the entire land was in danger of being taken over by the sea."* Crush shudders. Lyria doesn't have the same gut reaction to the prospect of floods, but still, she understood that such awesome power could be dangerous.

*"Ah yes, and the merrow—my people, who we now call Nalaran—were his army."*

*"Clear as a lantern in a mine,"* returns Crush. *"Just think what would have happened had the gods not stopped them."*

*"But look, I don't think that's the whole story,"* counters Lyria. *"A large group of merrow resisted his plan. They had no interest in wiping out the dry land. Look, this word is ...resisted..., then ...many fled..."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1e
items.description:
*"Let me see that."* Crush's curiosity is piqued. **She hands him the book.**

*"Then these refugees were the ones who tried to enter the celestial realm? If that's true, then they were asking for help. And that would mean the Tethered One was trying to prevent their deaths."*

*"Well, that does fit together, but it's just sad history. I don't see why we should get involved."*

items.name: Convo Crush 1f
items.description:
*"You know, you can be really stubborn sometimes,"* retorted Lyria. *"Like, why can't you just go with the flow."*

*"Never mind, I'll do it on my own then."* She leaves to find the Tethered One, entering through the subterranean waters as before.

items.name: Convo Crush 2a
items.description:
Crush watches as Dulcie walks up, feeling uncomfortably emotional. *"Heya, Dulc, how've you been?"*

*"Don't give me that, I know you've been avoiding me. Now, this lass here says she needs your help to save the world. But you won't lift a finger?"*

*"Now, see, Dulcie, you can be so unreasonable. The thing is, this guy, he's not one you'd bring to the tavern to hang out with. He's—"*

*"So that's your reason for not helping her? I don't believe it. Do you think she's right or not?"*

*"Well—"*

items.name: Convo Crush 2b
items.description:
Dulcie turns to Lyria. *"He'll help."*

{lemonchiffon|Edit **Crush** and *Show in Overview*}

Lyria looks at both of them and hears no argument from Crush. *"Um, well okay then. Now, we need 30 Spectrum Bars."*

Crush responds. *"There is a way to get those, but it's not easy. I'd need the **Harmony Pick.** **Thaddeus** has it, but he's not going to let anyone borrow it. He's even more stubborn than I am."*

Dulcie looks at him. *"Thaddeus, huh? I was just spilling a drink on him a few minutes ago in the tavern. Not my favorite customer. But whatever, wait here, I'll get your blasted pick."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 1a
items.description:
After the long trip north, Lyria enters Pike Village and sees the man she recognizes. *"Hello, remember me?"*

*"Why, Lyria, good to see you again!"* exclaims Danglars warmly, walking up and hugging her. *"What brings you here this time? Some kind of expedition no doubt."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 1b
items.description:
Lyria is a bit surprised at the sudden warmth, then remembers that {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} are often like that. And looking around at the inviting houses countering harsh conditions, it's not hard to understand why. She leans into his embrace for a moment before stepping back.

*"Well, yes, as a matter of fact, I am trying to find something. I don't suppose you've heard of a sunken library? Like, under the ocean somewhere."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 1c
items.description:
*"Hmm, let me think."* Danglars pauses. *"So, there are some timbers from a shipwreck to the northeast that we could investigate. But you'd have a hard time making it through the deep snow. Would you like to ride with me on a sled?"*

*"That sounds lovely!"* responds Lyria eagerly.

items.name: Convo Danglars 2a
items.description: Danglars is waiting for Lyria. *"Hurry, come aside to this **Snow Cave** where we can talk."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 2b
items.description:
Inside, Danglars pulls a wooden door shut behind them, covering the entrance.

Walking forward into the cave, Lyria asks, *"So what are your plans?"* But before she can turn around to face him, she is knocked to the snowy floor.

*"My plans? Funny you should ask. Let me fill you in on a recent event you may not be aware of."*

items.name: Convo Danglars 2c
items.description:
Danglars continues, as if lecturing a student. *"Some time after you left, I returned to the washed up timbers to see if there was anything we missed."*

*"There came a darkness in the east, and the waves frothed like mad. The Tiderender appeared in great anger."*

*"Atlanth spoke to me. 'A debt must be paid. The thief clad in kelphide. You know her.'"*

*"Seeing the god in such a state, I became arrogant despite my fear. 'Taken something from you, has she?'"*

*"Let me tell you, this really got the god upset. 'She pried open what should have stayed sealed, read what should have rotted. The library's currents still churn with her trespass. Find her. Bring her to me.'"*

items.name: Convo Danglars 2d
items.description:
*"It's only fair that I considered how to benefit. 'You come as a beggar, sea god. Why should I help you? Especially here on land.'"*

*"Atlanth's voice rumbled. 'Do not question my reach. But I have not come to threaten you—yet. I see through your lust, the one you want but cannot have."*

*"'This is what you will do. Sutherdepth, her dear pipe worker, will mysteriously go missing—I'll see to that. Capture Lyria and demand she return the stolen book. If her body should happen to be taken advantage of—well, let's just say I won't take notice.'"*

Danglars produces a chain from his pack. **Toggle Lyria's Bound status to on.**

items.name: Convo Danglars 2e
items.description:
Even bound by a chain anchored to the wall, Lyria is able to fight back enough to prevent him from having his way. But she won't be able to hold him off forever.

When Lyria doesn't return, Dulcie gets worried and goes to find Crush. Continue with **Start Convo Du2.**

items.name: Convo Daphnia 1a
items.description:
The Tethered One sees **Daphnia** walking down the path by a grassy hill, carrying a pitcher of milk. *"We need a way to cross the desert in the west."*

Daphnia looks at his dark clothes and glowing eyes, then sees the rest of the party and feels less frightened. *"Well, there is a **Sky Ship** that harbors here from time to time. Perhaps they could help."*

He considers this. *"That is an {LemonChiffon|Aetherian} pirate ship. They will not grant us passage so easily."* Then he looks down at his blade and smiles coldly. *"We must persuade them."*

*"Heavens, I want no part of such matters."* Daphnia raises the hem of her skirt and hurries down the path in the opposite direction.

items.name: Convo Dulcie 1a
items.description:
Lyria washes into the tavern. She spots Dulcie handing a drink to a patron, who responds by slapping her on the butt. Dulcie frowns and walks away.

Lyria calls over to her. *"Hey Dulcie, could we talk?"*

*"Sure, I need a break from this place anyway,"* she says sourly. They step out to the front of the tavern.

items.name: Convo Dulcie 1b
items.description:
Outside, Lyria starts. *"Dulcie, how do you feel about mending the broken world?"*

*"I'm glad there are people like you, dear, who are worried about that sort of thing,"* is Dulcie's reply.

*"Okay, well, I need your help with Crush, he's being obstinate. Can you persuade him to help me?"*

*"Crush, huh? Well, the two of us had something going for quite a long time, you know. I was happy then. How's that fellow of yours anyway, Sutherdepth was it?"*

*"Swirly's been working on the pipes as always. And he's not exactly **my** fellow. I'm not sure if I can be with someone who never swam beyond the eastern coral reef. But anyway, Crush is just over there, by the cliff.*"

{lemonchiffon|Edit **Dulcie** and mark *Show in Overview.*}

items.name: Convo Dulcie 2a
items.description:
Dulcie is worried. *"Have you seen Lyria?"*

Crush looks up from his mining work. *"She said she was going to find Danglars. Something sounded wrong."*

*"She should have been back by now."*

*"I'll go find her."*

----
**{lemonchiffon|The rescue:}**

1. Bring Crush to Pike Village, where he finds tracks leading to the Snow Cave. Equip the **Steel Axe** to bash down the door.
2. Run **Weapon To-Hit** (event) with the blunt side against the legs of **Danglars,** leaving him lame.
3. Send Lyria back to the Tethered One to **Start Convo Te3.**

items.name: Convo Dulcie 3a
items.description:
Landing on solid rock, but with water continuing to pour in from above, Dulcie looks around and sees a huge cavern lit by fire. Lyria, Crush, and the Tethered One have fallen with her.

Their cell was not the only one broken open. **Galebane,** who with **Suhkh** had been tormenting a prisoner named Lorcan, are also here.

**Evelyn** could not survive the fall in a **Wheelchair.** Her body now lies dead on the ground, sending Suhkh screeching out of it. The demon, now untethered, claws at nothing in a vain attempt at avoiding being dragged back to the underworld. With one last screech that gets drowned out by the water, her shadow is gone.

Set the location of Suhkh to *Nowhere.*

items.name: Convo Dulcie 3b
items.description:
The Tethered One points toward a wall. *"We are in the presence of a god."*

Dulcie looks, and where she thought there was only rock, a huge form rests. But **Vull,** who was involved in shaping not only Blackvein Hold but the Worldbridge itself, does not move or speak. He has long lain inactive, and now, the blast through the rock he had upheld and the cold rushing water have left him stunned.

The Tethered One stands up cautiously. *"It is he who is the cause of my long imprisonment, else I would have escaped long ago. But for now, he is unresponsive. We should use this opportunity before he recovers."*

Dulcie speaks. *"First, this {LemonChiffon|Aetherian}, Galebane, has done a great evil. Behold, the body of Evelyn, a simple legal clerk who was no threat to him."*

Galebane is wild with panic at being trapped underground. At her words, Galebane lunges at Dulcie. He stabs her side, causing a grave wound. *"For these words, you will die."* A second time, he raises his weapon against her.

items.name: Convo Dulcie 3c
items.description:
Before the blow can land, Crush seizes the wheelchair and twists the metal around Galebane, binding him.

Crush rushes over to Dulcie. *"She will not overcome this wound without help. The blade from Galebane contains sickness."*

The Tethered One looks at the rising water. *"There is no time. I need your help to forge a weapon."*

Crush is adamant. *"I'm taking her now. Here are the bars you need."* Then he hoists Dulcie over his strong shoulders and climbs towards the surface, navigating the irregular stone steps with ease.

Lyria understands the importance of the weapon for their quest. *"I'll stay to help while Crush takes care of Dulcie."*

Use the Tethered One to forge **Needle** and some **Shadow Silk,** then **Start Convo Ly1.**

items.name: Convo Dundii 1a
items.description:
Crush gingerly climbs a wooden ladder that creaks dangerously under his weight. At the top is a hut. Crush lays Dulcie on the bed.

*"This woman is gravely ill and will die without treatment. Please help us."*

Chief Dundii looks at her. *"Our healers can brew a cure potion, but you must do something for us. Destroy the **Animated Tree** in the **Jungle Interior.** Bring me a piece of its bark."*

items.name: Convo Dundii 2a
items.description:
Chief Dundii takes the bark and hands Crush the cure potion, who helps Dulcie drink it. After only an hour, she stands up from the bed.

Lyria arrives with the Tethered One. He looks around. *"There is a loom, but I do not have the skill to use it."*

Dulcie glares at him. *"I'm doing very well after being at death's door, thanks for asking. Seriously, am I the only one who knows how to weave? Give me that silk.*"

After she finishes, the party travels to the plains. Speak with **Daphnia.**

items.name: Convo Kormak 1a
items.description:
Lyria's not too keen on prolonged incarceration, but she might just kill Kormak instead. She pulls him under, threatening.

He gasps for air, offering information in exchange for his life. She agrees, listening.

items.name: Convo Kormak 1b
items.description:
Kormak tells Lyria about the **Tethered One**, who he had heard was in cell block D of **Blackvein Hold**.

After the conversation, Lyria lets him go, sensing that he's not particularly villainous. He scrambles to the bank and leaves quickly. (Edit **Kormak** and set his location to *Inactive*)

items.name: Convo Lyria 1a
items.description:
Lyria watches, mesmerized in horror, as the Tethered One presses his hand to Galebane, and the life force drains from the man's face until the body is only an empty shell.

Then, the Tethered One lifts Vull's mighty hammer and forges Needle and the shadow silk. It takes what seem like ages, as the water continues to rise, and Vull shows signs of stirring.

items.name: Convo Lyria 1b
items.description:
Finally, the crafts are complete, but a deluge swirls through the cavern. They race up the rocky steps, wet, and the Tethered One slips, dropping Needle into the swirling water.

Lyria dives in after the weapon. *"Take care when handling it!"* comes a warning from the Tethered One.

She reaches the floor, completely dark except for hissing lava in the distance, and grasps the hilt, careful not to touch the blade. As she rises, the cry of Galebane's soul fills her mind, a horrible combination of the evil things he'd done in life and agony at being unnaturally tethered to the weapon.

Climbing back onto the rocky stairs from the wild waters is not easy, but she manages it. Lyria is shaking as she hands the weapon back to the Tethered One. *"Do not make me do that again."*

items.name: Convo Lyria 1c
items.description:
Climbing higher, Lyria and the Tethered One leave the water behind. The steps continue on and on, until they lose any grasp of how many there might be, or how high.

Finally, they emerge in daylight, blinking to adjust their eyes.

Next, Crush brings Dulcie to the Jungle and speaks with the Chief.

items.name: Convo Sunderforge 1a
items.description:
As they climb off the pole onto the end of the Worldbridge, a great voice hails them. *"Our {RebeccaPurple|half fallen celestial} has returned, bringing a {blue|Nalaran} in tow once again."*

The Tethered One faces the god across the broken bridge. *"Sunderforge Stormcaller, the world has been broken for too long, and both the celestial and earthly planes have paid the price."*

Light flashes across the god's face. *"Grown proud, have we?"*  Then he laughs. *"If you think this little band of yours is enough to challenge our realm, then you have become foolish in the last few hundred years."*

items.name: Convo Sunderforge 1b
items.description:
Lyria can no longer contain the words burning within her. *"Stormcaller, the gods lie dormant or in hiding, and there is sickness in the earthly plane. The Drowned Court King is long gone, and the rest of my people had only sought shelter from you, not dominion over the earth."*

Sunderforge looks closely at her. *"I have followed your travels. You deal in matters that perhaps you do not understand. Yet your words belie a certain wisdom. What guarantee would you offer that your people will not seek to rise up and flood the world?"*

The Tethered One answers. *"I propose an offer. Make me mortal, and I will live as an {darkgray|Ithilborn}."*

items.name: Convo Sunderforge 1c
items.description: The Stormcaller's face lessens its intensity. *"The Drowned Court King may not be as fully gone as you believe. However, the proposed offer has the potential to set many wrongs right. Very well, I accept this offer. I will mend the broken bridge so that the celestial realm may once again govern the earthly plane."*

items.name: Convo Tethered 1a
items.description:
Lyria peers into the cell. She sees a man seated on a dirty mattress without sheets. Noticing the movement in the window, he looks up at her in surprise. *"How did you get here?"*

*"I dove through the underground waterways,"* she explains. *"I hear you're a special prisoner. Is there a reason I should help you?"*

items.name: Convo Tethered 1b
items.description:
*"I have been wrongfully imprisoned,"* he began. *"Those in power have put me here to preserve their control. But it has made the world broken. If you help me, perhaps we can mend it."*

Lyria might be willing to help a prisoner in need if she can trust him or know what he's about. *"Why should I trust you? After all, you don't have the look of an innocent; rather the opposite."* She suddenly notices the purple glow from deep within his eyes.

items.name: Convo Tethered 1c
items.description:
The Tethered One responds, *"There's a book that reveals my history. However, the gods have hidden it, I believe somewhere under water. Perhaps you could find it?"*

Lyria huffs. *"Well, there is a lot of water in the world. But I do know of someone who has spent years mapping oceans and lakes, a {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} by the name of **Danglars**, from **Pike Village.**. Perhaps he can help."*

items.name: Convo Tethered 2a
items.description:
Lyria returns to the cell. *"Okay, I found that book of yours. Flying porpoises, was the sea god angry. Anyway, I am on your side. How can I help?"*

The Tethered One answers, *"I'm going to need two things. First, a weapon. Second, a way out."*

*"For the weapon, we'll need **30 Spectrum Bars.** As for the way out, I have a plan involving water, a lot of it, but we can talk about that later."*

items.name: Convo Tethered 2b
items.description:
*"Now, this Crush you mentioned, I've heard of him. We should get him to join us, for the mining and generally being reliable."*

*"I tried,"* Lyria responds, *"but he's stubborn. I'll need backup. I know of a tavern woman in Dustridge Inn, **Dulcie,** who can help."*

*"A Jovial? Such people are useless for causes like ours. I respect your people much more, the Nalaran."*

*"Well, I'm going to talk to her anyway."* Lyria leaves.

items.name: Convo Tethered 3a
items.description:
Lyria swims up to the cell window. *"Danglars, the one who helped find the map, betrayed me, through a plot of the Tiderender."*

The Tethered One frowns. *"Making an enemy of a god is not to be undertaken lightly, but sometimes it must be done. I'm sorry you have to be tangled up in this."*

*"Well, maybe I wouldn't have agreed had I known from the start, but there's no turning back. You mentioned escaping by flooding the prison?"*

----
**{lemonchiffon|They come up with the following plan:}**

1. Crush gives Lyria a stick of dynamite.
2. Crush and Dulcie enter the front prison gate as guests and go into Cell D2.
3. Lyria must place the dynamite underwater outside of the window and detonate it.

items.name: Convo Thaddeus 1a
items.description:
Thaddeus had been ogling Dulcie's backside as she left, and now he sees her coming back in. *"Get over here. I'd like to discuss where you're going to be sleeping tonight."*

*"What would your wife say?"* answers Dulcie calmly. *"Honestly, I feel sorry for Bliss sometimes."*

Thaddeus shouts above the tavern din. *"Now, don't pretend to be all coy with me. It wouldn't be the first time I've taken you."*

*"And I don't plan to make a habit of it. Anyway, Darla is available if you're in need of paid company."*

items.name: Convo Thaddeus 1b
items.description:
*"Darla, huh? I mean, she's not bad, but I haven't had you in a long time."* Thaddeus has had a lot to drink, more than usual, and grows wild. He grabs Dulcie and throws her to the ground, then starts to climb on top of her.

The owner, Hink, rushes out from behind the bar. *"Thaddeus, what the hell, this is not acceptable."* He pulls the larger man up by his shoulders. Thaddeus spins and knocks Hink down without thinking.

Hink slowly gets up, staring angrily into Thaddeus's face without saying anything.

Thaddeus looks around, and the tavern has gone silent. *"Look, I may have gotten out of line here."* He extends a hand to help Dulcie up off of the floor.

items.name: Convo Thaddeus 1c
items.description:
Hink looks to Dulcie. *"What this man has done today is unacceptable. How do you want to handle this?"*

Dulcie hold back a sniffle and steadies herself to face Thaddeus. *"I'm willing to forget this incident, but I need something from you. We need to borrow the Harmony Pick."*

Thaddeus stiffens. *"The Harmony... now why would you want a thing like that?"*

*"Never you mind, and I personally guarantee we'll return it as soon as we're finished,"* she promises.

*"I'll hold you to that,"* he says threateningly, but reluctantly **gives her the pick.**

items.name: Dynamite
items.description:
Move everyone away from the cell window and light the fuse.
After the timer finishes, run **Detonated** (event) and follow the instructions.

items.name: Fishing Hook
items.description: Piercing damage.

items.name: Flint Knife
items.description: Useful for cutting crafted materials

items.name: Forbidden Book
items.description:
Atlanth won't let you leave with this unless he's distracted. Talk to him.

After escaping from the Sunken Library, Lyria should give the book to her friend **Crush** in **Dustridge Town.**

items.name: Helm
items.description: Wheel to steer the rudder.

items.name: Iron Dagger
items.description: Piercing dmg

items.name: Leather Straps
items.description: The leather reins and harness are a mass of misshapen knots, but with patience, they can be untangled and remade into a functional harness that suits the party's particular need.

items.name: Letter
items.description:
Lyria opens a hastily scribbled note. *"My darling Lyria, someone you care about could be in danger."*

Eyes widening, she continues reading. *"My sources tell me how you tricked the sea god. Fiercely angry, he's plotting revenge against Sutherdepth."*

*"Find me in Pike Village as soon as possible so we can prevent that from happening."*

The note is signed, *"Yours, Danglars."*

items.name: Needle
items.description: Hypodermically sharp thin blade that phases in and out of this plane. Stitch an earthly soul to the steel.

items.name: Pointed Stick
items.description: Piercing damage, can reach up to 1 tile away, could also be thrown.

items.name: Refractive Stealth Cloak
items.description:
Equip to the Tethered One's *Back* slot and increase dexterity by **+3** for a total of **12.**

While wearing the cloak, they'll never see him coming unless it's the brightest of sunny days, or else an {yellow|Anorkind} mage with light magic.

items.name: Rotten Soul
items.description: The life force of Galebane. Without it, the body is dead.

items.name: Scimitar
items.description: Swings quickly and does slashing dmg.

items.name: Shadow Cloak
items.description: Phases to hide the wearer from detection.

items.name: Shadow Silk
items.description: Clothing material made from metal **Spectrum Bars.**

items.name: Sky Ship Flight
items.description: It takes 4 days for the **Sky Pirate Captain** to sail your party over the desert to the **Western End.**

items.name: Spectrum Forge
items.description:
No one knows who built it, but this forge was uncovered in a deep chamber below the spectrum ore source. It runs on geothermal heat and requires no fuel.

This is the only place to smelt spectrum ore, but the bars can be used elsewhere.

items.name: Spectrum Ore
items.description: Leave Crush to mine. Meanwhile, have Lyria follow him to the Stalactite Room but then she **Receives a Letter** (event). Dulcie is back at work in the tavern.

items.name: Steel Axe
items.description:
Ideal for chopping wood.

As a weapon, normally does slashing damage, but the back can be used for blunt damage instead.

items.name: Steel Bar
items.description: To make steel, coal is required to combine with iron as well as fuel the forge.

items.name: Sunken Library Map
items.description: Scribbled notes of underwater landmarks and a dotted line pointing to the circled word "Library."

items.name: Unarmed
items.description:
Punch, kick, bite, whatever you can do, although it's not going to do a whole lot usually. 

For events, add this to a character's inventory first.

items.name: Vull's Hammer
items.description: Bound by a chain to the floor of the cavern. Neither the chain nor the hammer itself can be bent or broken even by Crush.

items.name: Wheelchair
items.description: Made of sturdy metal. A {peru|Stonereach} could bend it however.

items.name: Wooden Club
items.description: Blunt dmg

locations.name: BH Cell D2
locations.description: Barred window that looks out into a small cave ceiling over water.

locations.name: BH Cell D2 Window
locations.description: Going to the surface here shows a small, low cavern with only three feet between the water and the cave ceiling. The bars of a small cell window are east, allowing conversation with whoever is inside.

locations.name: Blackvein Gate
locations.description:
The guards determine who to let in and out. After hearing that a {blue|Nalaran} woman helped free **Kormak**, they'll interrogate **Lyria** if she approaches.

A number of {peru|Stonereach} work here, and {pink|Jovial} guests are welcomed by prisoners, as they are everywhere.

locations.name: Blackvein Hold Approach
locations.description: Looking down from the crest of a hill, you can see the **Blackvein Hold** gate ahead.

locations.name: Deep Rocky Pool — Below Surface
locations.description: Above, light rays penetrate from the surface. To the west, the water flows underground.

locations.name: Deep Rocky Pool — Surface
locations.description: Near Blackvein Hold, off of the main road. Trees lining the water's edge are available for crafting, to prepare for whatever lies in the depths.

locations.name: Deep Rocky Pool — Underground
locations.description: It's very dark here, making it difficult to detect threats. A quickly moving target could avoid attacks of opportunity by carefully kiting, as long as they don't fumble attacks.

locations.name: Desert
locations.description: Impractical to traverse except for the {orange|Firebranded.}

locations.name: Dustridge Tavern
locations.description: Cozy, dimly lit tavern with a roaring fireplace.

locations.name: Dustridge Town
locations.description: Busy working class community. The most important local industry is mining.

locations.name: East Harbor
locations.description: A major road goes through here, and there is a dock for freight ships. The ocean expands to the horizon in the east. Southwest is the town of **Dustridge**, while to the north lie the cold lands.

locations.name: Forge Chamber
locations.description: In the middle of the chamber, the forge connects from ceiling to floor like a pillar.

locations.name: Grove
locations.description: Frequented by Dustridge workers for harvesting wood.

locations.name: Jungle Interior
locations.description: Looming trees and tangled vines stretch for miles. Anyone skillful and brave enough to navigate to the western edge would find only a desert.

locations.name: Mountainside
locations.description:
To the southwest lies a vast jungle. From this height, the beginning of the desert can also be seen at the western edge of the jungle.

Far below and to the east, Lyria can make out the pool she had used to enter Blackvein Hold.

locations.name: Murky Pond
locations.description: On a hot afternoon, Lyria decides to cool off with a swim. She doesn't really mind the algae — the scum slips off of her dress.

locations.name: Narrow Glade
locations.description:
A day's journey southeast of **Blackvein Hold.**

Guards are starting the long march back with their prisoners, worried they're too far away.  Looking at the pond, **Kormak** considers that if he could free his hands, this might be a chance to escape by swimming. Suddenly, he notices a creature in green briefly popping above the pond surface before re-emerging. Curious, he looks carefully and discovers it's a young woman.

locations.name: Pike Village
locations.description: By an inland lake known for ice fishing, not far from the ocean. Houses are dug from snow or built with ice blocks.

locations.name: Sheer Pole
locations.description:
The western lands end in a vast pole parallel to the ground, some height above. Its length extends beyond the horizon both north and south, even when looking down from the sky. The pole is part of the world itself, bound by the same invisible threads that keep the entire terrestrial plane from falling into the great abyssal void.

----
After the party is bound to the **Leather Harness,** they push off south along the frictionless pole. The air is so thin in this region that it does not slow their movement. After some hours, the earth below them curves away, while the pole continues to go straight until the earth can be seen in the shape of a shell far behind. At last, they arrive at the **Worldbridge.**

Move to the Worldbridge and then detach from the harness.

locations.name: Sled Trail
locations.description:
It would be slow walking on this trail and impossible with wheels. Snow covered pine hills surround the area, for a quietly beautiful combination of dark green and white.

Move **Danglars** with Lyria.

locations.name: Snow Cave
locations.description: Dense snowy walls make it so sound does not travel outside even if someone were to walk nearby.

locations.name: Stalactite Room
locations.description: The only source of spectrum ore ever found is in this cave—luminescent stalactites that grow from the ceiling. Swarms of bats fly in and out of them.

locations.name: Sunken Library
locations.description: Dome-shaped building on the ocean floor with a doorway at the top.

locations.name: Treetop Village
locations.description:
High above ground is a baffling network of roped wooden bridges and huts.

In one hut lives the Chief, not noticeably different from any of the rest of the huts because of the egalitarian cultural ethos. He sits on a chair made of poles tied together.

locations.name: Vuldelf
locations.description: Ancient cavern deep underground. Fire and lava can be seen, and much of the room is filled with forge equipment.

locations.name: Washed Up Timbers
locations.description: Years ago, part of a wrecked ship washed ashore. Care must be taken to walk among the rotting wooden debris.

locations.name: Western End
locations.description: Sparsely populated. Horse riding nomads live here who are suited for the steppe land and thin dusty air.

locations.name: Western Rise
locations.description: Near the landing site of the Sky Ship, a stretch of elevated land rises up to meet the pole, stopping only a few feet below.

locations.name: Western Road
locations.description: Goes from Dustridge in the east, through the plains, and to the western jungle.

characters.name: Animated Tree
characters.description: Branches send out curling vines like whiplashes at passersby. Almost entirely immobile and very slow, attacking only 1 out of every 3 normal combat turns. Fears axes and fire.

characters.name: Atlanth Tiderender
characters.description: Sea deity, keeper of drowned truths.

characters.name: Chain Gang Guard 1
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {orange|Firebranded}, quarrelsome
- **Specialties:** melee mage, incompetent at watching yet suspicious
- **Appearance:** dark skin good for intense sunny climates

characters.name: Chain Gang Guard 2
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {pink|Jovial}, unmotivated but not easily intimidated or panicked
- **Specialties:** fighter, resistant to blunt force, slightly more incompetent than his fellow guard
- **Appearance:** large and fat

He is the primary cause of the delay, having said shortly before the opening scene: "Hey, don't worry, we'll have plenty of time to finish the card game and still get back before nightfall." Holding ropes that bind **Kormak**.

characters.name: Chief Dundii
Crush
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {peru|Stonereach}, taciturn, can shape rocks, from Dustridge
- **Specialties:** lumberjack, axe proficency, boxing skill
- **Appearance:** thick and sturdy, dark gray skin

characters.name: Danglars
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended}, reserved, inviting
- **Specialties:** seal hunter, fishing hook proficiency
- **Appearance:** fur clothing, bonelike skin not susceptible to frostbite, does not sweat

characters.name: Daphnia
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {peru|Stonereach}
- **Specialties:** milk maid, family owns livestock

characters.name: Darla
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {pink|Jovial}
- **Specialties:** tavern prostitute

characters.name: Dryad Succubus
Dulcie
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {pink|Jovial}, charismatic
- **Specialties:** brings drinks and entertains tavern goers, usually men, not paid to be a prostitute although her job has at times led to sleeping with patrons
- **Appearance:** age 30, soft and curvy build, light chocolate skin, low-cut bodice, messy layered colorful skirts

characters.name: Evelyn
Galebane
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {LemonChiffon|Aetherian}, aloof
- **Specialties:** sorcerer, prison life skills instructor ostensibly to integrate into society

Enjoys tormenting prisoners. Knowledge of the occult used to summon **Suhkh** through hell plane.

characters.name: Kormak
Leather Harness
characters.description:
After finishing the harness (**Leather Straps** quantity **2**), tie it around the pole, with leather straps to bind the party members.

To do this, set the harness to travel with "main party" and toggle the **Bound** status of the 4 members to *On.* Then, move all onto the pole and push off.

characters.name: Lorcan
Lyria
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {blue|Nalaran}, water affinity
- **Specialties:** huntress, spear proficiency, young and brave explorer
- **Appearance:** soft coral colored skin, slightly webbed fingers, popup fin flaps, lovely thin figure, tight dark green kelp-hide dress (sturdy leather), luminescent freckles across her nose and shoulders

characters.name: Sky Pirate 2
characters.description: - **Ancestry:** {LemonChiffon|Aetherian}, wings to prevent injury from falling and facilitate jumps

characters.name: Sky Pirate 3
characters.description: - **Ancestry:** {LemonChiffon|Aetherian}, wings to prevent injury from falling and facilitate jumps

characters.name: Sky Pirate Captain
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {LemonChiffon|Aetherian}, wings to prevent injury from falling and facilitate jumps

Must be alive to pilot the craft. More accommodating when tickled with something sharp from behind.

characters.name: Sled
characters.description: Seats two under heavy blankets for an intimate ride. Pulled by wolves, which only the {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} have undertaken to make use of. Keep your hands away from their teeth!

characters.name: Subterranean Shark
characters.description:
Slow and obvious, but strong teeth when adjacent. Takes 1.5 turns per tile compared with other aquatic beings. Good sense of smell to detect prey.

There was once a {CornflowerBlue|Frostblended} prisoner who spent 12 years in cell block D, working every day on the rock with a chisel until he had managed a 10 ft long passage. At the end, he found water, and dove in. Now, whether he would have had enough air to make it to the surface is unlikely, but we'll never know for sure, because this shark made a happy meal of him.

characters.name: Suhkh
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {purple|Demon} (minor), succubus
- **Specialties:** derives power from enticing and tormenting
- **Appearance:** not visible in earthly plane, when seen in hell: orange pupils, blackened rotting bare flesh, whip-like tail, bodily fluids dripping, sulfur smell

characters.name: Sunderforge Stormcaller
characters.description: Forged the first anchors between celestial and earthly realms, but also smashed the Worldbridge with his mighty hammer.

characters.name: Sutherdepth
Tethered One
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {rebeccapurple|half fallen celestial} (unique category)
- **Specialties:** partial existence in both spiritual and physical plane, dagger/knives proficiency, rogue, can slip through cracks, reportedly can stitch souls onto physical surfaces
- **Appearance:** extroardinarily thin, from within eye sockets comes a {rebeccapurple|purple glow} rather than irises, long smooth dark pants and shirt, pale face, slick hair

characters.name: Thaddeus
characters.description:
- **Ancestry:** {peru|Stonereach}
- **Specialties:** wealthy mining foreman, somewhat of a bully

characters.name: Vull
characters.description:
- god of molten rock, forges
- passively upholds seal of Blackvein Hold
- teamed up with Sunderforge to build the bridge in the depths of time
- almost completely inactive in modern times as if he were part of the rock itself

events.name: Burning Bundle
events.description:
- Held, not thrown (melee range)
- Requires a turn to light before using
- Requires kindling such as branches, or cloth fabric could do the job in a pinch

events.name: Death's Door
events.description: HP reduced to 0 puts main characters in a state of unconsciousness, where they have 3 turns to try to revive, unless they're healed by someone else.

events.name: Detonated
Receives a Letter
events.description: While Crush is mining **Spectrum Ore,** a courier ventures into the mine to pass on an urgent letter. Resolve the event and find the letter in Lyria's inventory.

events.name: Start Convo Ko1
events.description:
Run this event once Lyria is ready to speak with Kormak, out of earshot of the guards.
Then start the conversation by going to **Convo Kormak 1a.**

events.name: Water Bolt
events.description:
- As used by the Nalaran, needs water — natural rather than studied magic
- Guaranteed success if water is available, variable damage (cantrip)
- Blunt force dmg, knockback
- Almost no dmg against enemies under water although the current pushes them back

events.name: Weapon Dmg
events.description: If to-hit succeeds then roll to determine dmg.

events.name: Weapon To-Hit
events.description:
Attempt to land a physical blow, either melee or ranged depending on the weapon. Could also be unarmed.
- On **Major Success,** get an extra attack.
- On **Major Failure,** the opponent gets an extra opportunity to move.
